EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of policy cancellation due to unsuccessful payment.
EmailTemplate.name: GC 3
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation of your Policy
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
As it has not been possible to collect payment for your policy, we regretfully inform you that your insurance policy has been cancelled from inception. This is in accordance with our Terms and Conditions.
Please be advised that your insurance is now considered null and void and you have no rights to any cover. Claims made on this policy will not be honoured.
If you have any questions then please do not hesitate to get in touch. We hope you will considered Kingsbridge for your business insurance in the future.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
